authority.department: Department of Labour, Employment & Skill Development, Government of Arunachal Pradesh

overview: State-specific labour law requirements applicable to establishments operating in Arunachal Pradesh.

rules.title: Review Arunachal Pradesh Shops and Establishments Registration
rules.description: Determine whether registration under the applicable Shops and Establishments legislation is required.

citations.reference: Applicable Arunachal Pradesh Shops and Establishments legislation

rules.title: Maintain Statutory Registers
rules.description: Maintain registers, records and notices prescribed under applicable labour laws.

rules.title: Display Statutory Notices
rules.description: Display notices required under applicable state labour legislation.

rules.title: Review Working Hours, Leave and Holidays
rules.description: Ensure compliance with state-specific provisions relating to working hours, weekly holidays and leave.

recommended.title: Annual Labour Compliance Review
recommended.description: Conduct an annual review of compliance with applicable state labour laws.

recommended.title: Digitise Labour Compliance Records
recommended.description: Maintain electronic labour compliance records wherever legally permissible.
